steps.title: Write the height
steps.content:
The container is a right cylinder, so its volume is base area times height. A height that is $5$ inches longer than the radius is
$$
h=r+5
$$

steps.title: Substitute into volume
steps.content:
Use the cylinder volume formula:
$$
V=\pi r^2h=\pi r^2(r+5)
$$

steps.title: Distribute the expression
steps.content: Multiply $\pi r^2$ by each term in the parentheses: $$ V=\pi r^3+5\pi r^2 $$ The answer is D.
